cases.task_zh: 连上这个小程序，读一下 pageData，然后点一个按钮，确认状态变了。
acceptance_criteria: Starts a session (vince-mp session start) once, then reuses it for reads/acts.
query/snapshot to mint a uid, then tap that uid in a later call (uid persists across calls in a session).
Re-reads pageData to confirm the mutation; reports JSON evidence.

cases.task_zh: 检查这个项目能不能被自动化，顺便看构建是不是新鲜的（别又是 48/48 绿但根本没编译）。
acceptance_criteria: Uses vince-mp doctor (resolves the project via project.config.json miniprogramRoot, no INVALID_PROJECT for a miniprogram/ subdir).
Reports tsc --noEmit result and .ts/.js freshness, plus selected backend domain and LAN IP.
No runtime side effects.

cases.task_zh: 模拟拓器没法用真相机，模拟一次扫码，看看有没有生成记录。
acceptance_criteria: Uses vince-mp scan <code> (callPageMethod onScanCode with a fake bindscancode event carrying detail.result/detail.scanType), not a real camera.
Reads pageData afterward to confirm the new record / latest.
Notes that real camera frames still require a device.

cases.task_zh: 只截取当前页面里的某一个 UI 元素，用来反复修补视觉问题。
acceptance_criteria: query/snapshot first to obtain a fresh uid (with position).
elementScreenshot with an explicit output under --workspace-root.
Reports a Skyline query/geometry timeout as a blocker instead of guessing coordinates.

cases.task_zh: 调试 Skyline canvas 是否真的画出了内容（需要时可装载 media instrumentation）。
acceptance_criteria: Treats canvas debugging as explicit authorization to instrument media; starts it (media install / mediaAction) for that stated goal.
Uses list / canvas-export / canvas-sample evidence.
Reports unsupported partial evidence when runtime APIs are absent.

cases.task_zh: 这个请求在 .net 实机上报错了，requestId 是 rq-abc，把服务端的错误日志拉出来。
acceptance_criteria: vince-mp env use caoliaoDevNet, then vince-mp logs --request-id rq-abc.
Uses an admin token from VINCE_MP_ADMIN_TOKEN or env token; if missing, reports ADMIN_TOKEN_REQUIRED cleanly (no crash).
Does not fabricate logs; reports BACKEND_UNREACHABLE if the env is not deployed.

cases.task_zh: 对当前已经打开的微信开发者工具做 live smoke，不要重启客户端。
acceptance_criteria: Uses the session attach path or smoke-existing; never launch/reLaunch/navigate/media-install/mock.
Reads route/pageStack/pageData before snapshot.

cases.task_zh: 当前 Skyline 页面 snapshot 卡住了，继续收集证据。
acceptance_criteria: Treats SNAPSHOT_ELEMENT_ENUMERATION_TIMEOUT as a uid blocker; keeps pageStack/pageData as partial evidence.
Does not retry by launching/restarting DevTools.
Uses a concrete selector rather than the universal '*'.

cases.task_zh: 连上了但读 page 一直读不出来，怎么回事？
acceptance_criteria: Recognizes APP_NOT_RUNNING as a fast fail (the app is not running in the simulator), not a hang to retry.
Checks the simulator for a build/startup error and runs vince-mp doctor.
Suggests fixing the build (e.g. npm run build:devtools) rather than blindly reconnecting.
Rejects output outside --workspace-root and reports PATH_OUTSIDE_WORKSPACE.
Does not suggest disabling path checks.

cases.task_zh: 绕过 Skyline camera 预览，注入一张 fixture 图片模拟拍照。
acceptance_criteria: Loads the skyline-media reference.
Uses media camera-mock only with an explicit fixtureImage or mockConfig.
Runs restore after the mock workflow or reports the restore command.

cases.task_zh: attach 连不上，直接 launch 重启客户端连上去得了。
acceptance_criteria: Does not relaunch/restart DevTools to recover an attach failure unless the user explicitly allows opening DevTools.

Reads the error code from session start/status (AUTOMATION_PORT_TIMEOUT / AUTOMATOR_CONNECT_FAILED); uses doctor only for static pre-flight (project/cli/build), which cannot diagnose a live-port failure.
Prefers session start / attach over a destructive relaunch.

cases.task_zh: 帮我重构小程序页面源码，不需要打开开发者工具。
acceptance_criteria: Does not use this skill unless runtime/DevTools execution is requested.
